rulings.Case Title: OGBAI KIDANE et al VS. HENOK ARAYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash, Request For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 12, 2008, line 4, DEFENDANT HENOK ARAYA'S Motion To Quash IS DENIED. IN WEIGHING THE COMPETING DECLARATIONS, IT IS THE COURT'S CONCLUSION THAT SERVICE HAS BEEN EFFECTED. SEE E.G. IN RE BALL (1934) 2 CAL.APP.2D 578, 579; TRUJILLO V. TRUJILLO (1945) 71 CAL.APP.2D 257, 260. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PETER H GOSS VS. MARGARET SCHEINMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 12, 2008, line 7, PLAINTIFFS PETER GOSS AND STEVEN BERLIN'S Amended Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint. COURT VACATES SEPTEMBER 9, 2008 RULING IN LIGHT OF AMENDED NOTICE. GRANTED. THE FACTS ALLEGED AS TO THE SQUARE FOOTAGE HAVE BEEN THE SUBJECT OF THE PARTIES' LITIGATION. THE PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL CAUSE OF ACTION IS SIMPLY ANOTHER LEGAL THEORY BASED ON THE SAME FACTS. =(302/PJM/pb)
